raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Prone restraint is a dangerous form of physical restraint that can cause harm to students.",
    "Prone restraint is often used on students with special needs.",
    "In 2018, a 13-year-old student with autism died after being held in a prone restraint for over an hour.",
    "Prone restraint is considered an outdated and barbaric form of discipline.",
    "The U.S. Department of Education recommends banning the use of prone restraints.",
    "Twenty-one states have prohibited the use of prone restraints on all students.",
    "In 2019, prone restraints were found to be used at a higher rate for Black students.",
    "California law currently allows prone restraint to be used by trained personnel under specific conditions."
  ]
}
